projectDescription: A vehicle reservation web application that allows users to browse a vehicle catalog, create and manage reservations, and perform online check-in.
keyFeatures: Vehicle catalog browsing with detailed cards (name, type, price per day)
Reservation creation with pickup/dropoff location and dates
User authentication with JWT token-based sessions
My Reservations dashboard with status tracking and cancellation
Online check-in using reservation code (IRN), last name, and pickup date
publicApiSurface: POST /auth/login — Authenticate user and receive JWT token
POST /auth/register — Register a new user account
GET /vehicles — Retrieve the full vehicle catalog
POST /reservations — Create a new vehicle reservation
